case_title: JULIANA VALERIE MCCARTHY VS. MICHAEL K. BENGSTON et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCCARTHY, JULIANA VALERIE AS TO DEFENDANT BENGSTON, MICHAEL K.

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
RETURNED MAIL SENT TO DEIDRE BENGSTON OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - POST OFFICE PROVIDES A FORWARDING ADDRESS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT MCCARTHY, JULIANA VALERIE TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT BENGSTON, MICHAEL K. BENGSTON, DEIDRE THE COURT FINDS THE LANDLORD AUTHORIZED THE TENANT IN WRITING TO MOVE INTO THE TOP UNIT FOR THE SAME RENT AND NEVER REVOKED THAT AUTHORIZATION BY A WRITTEN NOTICE AND CONTINUED TO COLLECT RENT EVEN AFTER SHE HAD NOTICE THAT THE TENANT WAS IN THE UPPER UNIT. CROSS-COMPLAINT WITHDRAWN BY APPELLANT/RESPONDENTS BENGSTON IN THE RECORD. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-07-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Juliana Valerie McCarthy, Plaintiff/Appellant. Robert R. McCarthy is also present, with witness Ahmad Larizneh.
Michael K. Bengston and Deidre Bengston, Defendants/Respondents. Defendants/Respondents withdraw the cross complaint.

The cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Plaintiff/Appellant Juliana Valerie McCarthy testifies on behalf of herself. Ahmad Larizneh testifies on behalf of plaintiff/Appellant.

Defendant/Respondent Deidre Bengston testifies on behalf of herself, and Michael K. Bengston also testifies.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the court rules in favor of Defendants/Respondents.
All exhibits are retained.

Judge Anne Christine Massulo, Clerk Vicki Mack, Not Reported (Dept. 306)
